A '''child''' lived in the slums of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]]. [[Spiz's gang|Spiz's hoodlums]] chased the child with intent to [[Death/Legends|kill]] for no apparent reason, calling their victim "brat" until they were scared off by a [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]] illusion created by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Yarael Poof/Legends|Yarael Poof]]. The child had four arms and an exposed head structure, including a number of yellow-green orbs on both sides.

[[File:ChildHead-ZW.jpg|thumb|right|150px|The child turning their head]]
